title: Security Guard

rationales.taskAutomation: Foot patrol, access control, and in-person response can't be automated, but AI video analytics now handles a real share of the monitoring workload.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-powered camera analytics for anomaly and intrusion detection are mature and deployed at scale in corporate and retail security.
rationales.adoption: Large corporate campuses, retail chains, and financial institutions have adopted AI video monitoring; government and healthcare sites lag on procurement and trust grounds.
rationales.agenticExposure: Camera-feed triage, alert generation, and incident logging form an agent-ownable monitoring pipeline; physical response and de-escalation stay human.

tasksGrowing: Coordinating with law enforcement during real events
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 33-9032, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI video-analytics platform operation and alert triage

insight: AI camera analytics already does the watching, flagging anomalies across hundreds of feeds no human could track continuously. It still can't walk the floor, de-escalate a confrontation, or make the judgment call on when to intervene, which is why the job is shifting from watching monitors to responding to what the monitors flag.
